    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

    status='unknown_route'

state={'bem':'BEM-866','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}

Path('governance/reports/bem866_execute_bem865_route.md').write_text('# BEM-866 | Execute BEM-865 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-866'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem866_execute_bem865_route.json','governance/reports/bem866_execute_bem865_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem866_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
